VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Contrastive Representation Distillation" is a real, well-documented work by Yonglong Tian, Dilip Krishnan, and Phillip Isola, published at ICLR 2020 (not 2019) with arXiv preprint from October 2019. The cited authors match exactly; the automated checkers' reported mismatches (first author "Shipeng Fu" and year 2022) are incorrect — the true authors are Tian, Krishnan, and Isola, and the paper appeared in 2019/2020.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.10699
